## What this changes

One or two sentences. Reference the issue or discussion this closes.

Closes #

## Why

The production problem this solves, not the engineering rationale.
If there's no linked issue, give the context here.

## How I tested

- [ ] Ran locally (`pnpm dev`)
- [ ] Verified the affected node / route / page in a browser
- [ ] If it touches generation: confirmed at least one real fal.ai
      submission still works end-to-end
- [ ] If it touches auth / sessions / spend gate: confirmed the gate
      still rejects what it should

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything you want a second pair of eyes on, or design choices you
want to flag. Leave blank if nothing notable.
